title: podman-remote debloat: remove libimage dependency
body:
The podman-remote binary size decreases from 44788 KB to 39424 KB (not stripped).

see commits for details

```release-note
podman build supports to new options: --layer-label and --cw.
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Looks like you have problems finding Get/SetImage

This is because the linter is reading files it should lint under remote mode. Both podman and podman-remote build just fine. Properly need to clutter the whole repo with `!remote` tags to prevent the linter from doing this.

So podman get bloated by buildah, I assume this is caused by the confidential image work by @nalind
```
bin/podman           size= 58380296  delta=285440
```

But this PR is only for podman-remote anyway and that seems to work as expected:
```
bin/podman-remote    size= 40357944  delta=-5485392
```
